_meta.name: HIPAA Security Rule 2024 NPRM Forward-Compatibility Overlay
_meta.purpose: Flags BobGuard-enforced controls whose strictness anticipates the proposed 2024 HIPAA Security Rule NPRM, so a regulated entity adopting BobGuard today is forward-compatible with the proposed rule.
_meta.source: HHS OCR, Notice of Proposed Rulemaking, 'HIPAA Security Rule To Strengthen the Cybersecurity of Electronic Protected Health Information,' RIN 0945-AA22, 90 Fed. Reg. 898 (Jan. 6, 2025).
_meta.framing_disclaimer: The 2024 NPRM is a PROPOSED rule, not law. BobGuard refusal language uses 'proposes' / 'would' phrasing and never asserts an existing legal obligation under the proposed text. If the final rule departs from these proposals, this overlay must be updated.
_meta.compliance_window: 180 days after the effective date of any final rule (per 45 CFR 160.105 standard compliance period).

proposed_changes.title: Removal of the addressable / required distinction
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM proposes to remove the distinction between addressable and required implementation specifications. Most existing addressable specifications would become required.
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard treats all listed controls as required by default. The refusal language always offers a 'forward-compat' note when an existing addressable spec is being enforced.

proposed_changes.title: Explicit Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) requirement
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM proposes to add an explicit MFA requirement and a defined term for 'Multi-factor Authentication.'
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard's pattern set under 164.312(d) flags single-factor authentication on ePHI-bearing systems with `severity: block`.

proposed_changes.title: Encryption of ePHI: addressable → required
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM proposes to expressly require encryption of ePHI at rest and in transit, with limited exceptions, eliminating the existing per-entity reasonableness analysis.
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard's encryption-at-rest and TLS controls are `severity: block` regardless of the addressable status under the existing rule.

proposed_changes.title: Technology Asset Inventory + ePHI mapping
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM proposes a new standard requiring regulated entities to maintain a technology asset inventory and a network/data-flow map showing where ePHI is created, received, maintained, or transmitted.
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard's `data-flow-tracer` skill outputs a Mermaid network/ePHI-flow map per PR; the auditor PDF includes a Technology Asset Inventory section auto-built from the repo's package manifests and infrastructure code.

proposed_changes.title: Network segmentation
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM proposes an explicit implementation specification for network segmentation to limit lateral movement.
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard inspects infrastructure-as-code (Terraform / Helm / K8s manifests) for missing NetworkPolicies or unsegmented VPCs and emits a `severity: warn` finding.

proposed_changes.title: Vulnerability scanning and penetration testing
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM proposes explicit requirements for vulnerability scans (every 6 months proposed) and penetration testing (annual proposed).
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard checks for the presence of CI workflow files invoking SAST/DAST and a documented pen-test policy in `compliance/policies/`.

proposed_changes.title: Critical-system restoration within 72 hours
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM seeks comment on requiring restoration of critical relevant electronic information systems and data within 72 hours.
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard inspects the contingency plan markdown in `compliance/policies/contingency-plan.md` for explicit recovery time objective (RTO) ≤ 72h.

proposed_changes.title: Risk analysis remediation timing
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM proposes that regulated entities implement security measures in a timely manner to address risks identified in their risk analysis, in accordance with priorities established under §164.308(a)(5)(ii)(C).
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard cross-references PR diffs against the latest `risk-analysis.json` and surfaces controls associated with high-priority risks not yet remediated.

proposed_changes.title: Request for Information: Artificial Intelligence and ePHI
proposed_changes.summary: The NPRM contains a Request for Information on the role of AI in protecting ePHI and the security risks AI may introduce.
proposed_changes.bobguard_action: BobGuard emits a watsonx.governance entry per PR documenting the AI-assisted code generation provenance — directly responsive to the RFI's stated concerns about AI-generated code in regulated environments.

demo_callout.tagline: Forward-compatible with the 2024 HIPAA Security Rule NPRM (proposed Jan 6, 2025).
demo_callout.tagline_long: BobGuard's enforcement defaults to the stricter standards proposed in the HHS OCR Notice of Proposed Rulemaking 'HIPAA Security Rule To Strengthen the Cybersecurity of Electronic Protected Health Information' (RIN 0945-AA22, Jan. 6, 2025). A regulated entity adopting BobGuard today is positioned for compliance with the proposed rule's 180-day window.
